title: Silver Plastic Wall Clock, 23cm (1 Piece) - Battery-Operated, Decorative Timepiece for Home & Office Spaces
features: ELEGANT SILVER DESIGN: The sleek silver edging on this wall clock adds a touch of elegance to any room. Its 23cm diameter also makes it a statement piece that will catch the eye of anyone who enters the room.
HIG-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Made from durable plastic, this clock is designed to last. It can withstand everyday wear and tear, making it suitable for use in both home and office environments.

BATTERY POWERED CONVENIENCE: No need to worry about finding a nearby outlet or untangling messy cords. This clock is powered by batteries, giving you the freedom to place it anywhere in your home or office.

DECORATIBE & PRACTICAL: While this clock serves its purpose as a timekeeper, it also adds a decorative touch to any room. Its elegant design and silver edging make it a stylish addition to any decor theme.

CLEAR TIME DISPLAY: The clear white face and bold black hands make it easy to read the time at a glance. No need to strain your eyes to see the hour and minute hands. The red second hand adds a touch of color and makes tracking seconds effortless.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality battery-operated wall clock features a white face with silver edging and black hour and minutes hands with a red second hand with a diameter of 23cm and uses quartz technology to keep accurate time. Safety Warning No warning applicable
